name: Watts International Maritime Engineering Limited
summary: Watts International Maritime Engineering Limited provides port, waterway, and marine engineering services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through two segments, Ports Infrastructure and Waterway Engineering. It engages in port infrastructure works, including wharf construction; water and other engineering projects comprising waterway dredging improvement and hydraulic reclamation; and municipal engineering projects, such as urban public infrastructure construction, including highways, bridges, and tunnels, as well as urban greening and building construction. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
